from pyspark.sql import SparkSession
from pyspark.sql.functions import *
from pyspark.sql.types import *
import random
import uuid
from datetime import datetime, timedelta

geography_data = [
    (1, "IND", "India", "APAC", "INR"),
    (2, "USA", "United States", "Americas", "USD"),
    (3, "UAE", "United Arab Emirates", "Middle East", "AED"),
    (4, "CHN", "China", "APAC", "CNY")
]

schema = StructType([
    StructField("geography_sk", IntegerType(), False),        # Surrogate Key
    StructField("country_code", StringType(), False),         # Natural Key
    StructField("country_name", StringType(), False),
    StructField("region", StringType(), False),
    StructField("default_currency_code", StringType(), False),
    StructField("created_timestamp", TimestampType(), False)
])

# Add created timestamp
current_time = datetime.now()
geography_data_with_ts = [
    (*row, current_time) for row in geography_data
]

df_geography = spark.createDataFrame(geography_data_with_ts, schema)

companies = []
company_id = 1

# Distribution: India 6, USA 6, UAE 4, China 4
distribution = {
    "IND": 6,
    "USA": 6,
    "UAE": 4,
    "CHN": 4
}

current_time = datetime.now()

for country_code, count in distribution.items():
    
    geo_row = df_geography.filter(col("country_code") == country_code).collect()[0]
    geography_sk = geo_row["geography_sk"]
    base_currency = geo_row["default_currency_code"]
    
    for i in range(count):
        companies.append((
            company_id,                              # surrogate key
            f"COMP{company_id:03}",                  # natural key
            f"{country_code}_Company_{i+1}",
            geography_sk,
            base_currency,
            "USD",                                   # reporting currency
            random.choice(["Manufacturing", "Technology", "Logistics", "Retail"]),
            True,
            current_time
        ))
        
        company_id += 1

schema_company = StructType([
    StructField("company_sk", IntegerType(), False),
    StructField("company_code", StringType(), False),
    StructField("company_name", StringType(), False),
    StructField("geography_sk", IntegerType(), False),
    StructField("base_currency_code", StringType(), False),
    StructField("reporting_currency_code", StringType(), False),
    StructField("industry_type", StringType(), True),
    StructField("active_flag", BooleanType(), True),
    StructField("created_timestamp", TimestampType(), True)
])

df_company = spark.createDataFrame(companies, schema_company)

currency_data = [
    (1, "INR", "Indian Rupee", 2),
    (2, "USD", "US Dollar", 2),
    (3, "AED", "UAE Dirham", 2),
    (4, "CNY", "Chinese Yuan", 2)
]

schema_currency = StructType([
    StructField("currency_sk", IntegerType(), False),
    StructField("currency_code", StringType(), False),   # Natural Key
    StructField("currency_name", StringType(), False),
    StructField("decimal_precision", IntegerType(), False),
    StructField("created_timestamp", TimestampType(), False)
])

current_time = datetime.now()
currency_data_with_ts = [(*row, current_time) for row in currency_data]

df_currency = spark.createDataFrame(currency_data_with_ts, schema_currency)

df_currency.write.mode("overwrite").parquet(
    f"{base_path}/dim_currency"

currency_type_data = [
    (1, "Transaction"),
    (2, "Base"),
    (3, "Reporting")
]

schema_currency_type = StructType([
    StructField("currency_type_sk", IntegerType(), False),
    StructField("currency_type_name", StringType(), False),
    StructField("created_timestamp", TimestampType(), False)
])

currency_type_data_with_ts = [(*row, current_time) for row in currency_type_data]

df_currency_type = spark.createDataFrame(currency_type_data_with_ts, schema_currency_type)

df_currency_type.write.mode("overwrite").parquet(
    f"{base_path}/dim_currency_type"

document_type_data = [
    (1, "INV", "Invoice"),
    (2, "PAY", "Payment"),
    (3, "ADJ", "Adjustment"),
    (4, "ACR", "Accrual"),
    (5, "REV", "Reversal")
]

schema_document_type = StructType([
    StructField("document_type_sk", IntegerType(), False),
    StructField("document_type_code", StringType(), False),
    StructField("description", StringType(), False),
    StructField("created_timestamp", TimestampType(), False)
])

document_type_data_with_ts = [(*row, current_time) for row in document_type_data]

df_document_type = spark.createDataFrame(document_type_data_with_ts, schema_document_type)

df_document_type.write.mode("overwrite").parquet(
    f"{base_path}/dim_document_type"
)

start_date = datetime(2023, 1, 1)
end_date   = datetime(2025, 12, 31)

dates = []
current_date = start_date
sk = 1

while current_date <= end_date:
    dates.append((sk, current_date))
    current_date += timedelta(days=1)
    sk += 1

schema_calendar = StructType([
    StructField("fiscal_date_sk", IntegerType(), False),
    StructField("fiscal_date", DateType(), False)
])

df_calendar = spark.createDataFrame(dates, schema_calendar)

df_calendar = df_calendar \
    .withColumn("day_number", dayofmonth("fiscal_date")) \
    .withColumn("week_number", weekofyear("fiscal_date")) \
    .withColumn("month_number", month("fiscal_date")) \
    .withColumn("fiscal_month", date_format("fiscal_date", "yyyy-MM")) \
    .withColumn("fiscal_quarter", concat(lit("Q"), quarter("fiscal_date"))) \
    .withColumn("fiscal_year", year("fiscal_date")) \
    .withColumn("month_name", date_format("fiscal_date", "MMMM")) \
    .withColumn("is_month_end", last_day("fiscal_date") == col("fiscal_date")) \
    .withColumn("is_quarter_end",
        (last_day("fiscal_date") == col("fiscal_date")) &
        (month("fiscal_date").isin([3,6,9,12]))
    ) \
    .withColumn("is_year_end",
        (last_day("fiscal_date") == col("fiscal_date")) &
        (month("fiscal_date") == 12)
    )

df_calendar.write.mode("overwrite").parquet(
    f"{base_path}/dim_fiscal_calendar"

profit_units = []
profit_unit_sk = 1
current_time = datetime.now()

business_lines = [
    "Consumer Products",
    "Enterprise Services",
    "Digital Solutions",
    "Supply Chain",
    "Finance Operations",
    "Research & Innovation"
]

for row in df_company.collect():
    company_sk = row["company_sk"]
    
    # 6 profit units per company
    for i in range(6):
        profit_units.append((
            profit_unit_sk,                         # surrogate key
            f"PU{profit_unit_sk:04}",               # natural key
            company_sk,                             # FK
            random.choice(business_lines),
            True,
            current_time
        ))
        
        profit_unit_sk += 1

schema_profit_unit = StructType([
    StructField("profit_unit_sk", IntegerType(), False),
    StructField("profit_unit_code", StringType(), False),
    StructField("company_sk", IntegerType(), False),
    StructField("business_line", StringType(), True),
    StructField("active_flag", BooleanType(), True),
    StructField("created_timestamp", TimestampType(), True)
])

df_profit_unit = spark.createDataFrame(profit_units, schema_profit_unit)

df_profit_unit.write.mode("overwrite").parquet(
    f"{base_path}/dim_profit_unit"

account_types = ["Revenue", "Expense", "Asset", "Liability"]
reporting_groups = ["Operating", "Non-Operating", "Financial", "Tax"]

accounts_raw = []

# Initial load (2023)
initial_date = datetime(2023, 1, 1)

for i in range(200):
    accounts_raw.append((
        f"ACC{i+1:04}",                     # Natural Key
        random.choice(account_types),
        random.choice(reporting_groups),
        initial_date                        # Source updated timestamp
    ))

# Simulate updates in 2025 for 20 accounts
update_date = datetime(2025, 1, 1)

for i in range(20):
    accounts_raw.append((
        f"ACC{i+1:04}",                     # Same natural key
        random.choice(account_types),
        random.choice(reporting_groups),    # Changed reporting group
        update_date
    ))

schema_account_raw = StructType([
    StructField("account_number", StringType(), False),
    StructField("account_type", StringType(), False),
    StructField("reporting_group", StringType(), False),
    StructField("source_updated_timestamp", TimestampType(), False)
])

df_accounts_raw = spark.createDataFrame(accounts_raw, schema_account_raw)

df_accounts_raw.write.mode("overwrite").parquet(
    f"{base_path}/dim_financial_account_raw"
)

df_accounts_raw.orderBy("account_number", "source_updated_timestamp")

cost_objects_raw = []

initial_date = datetime(2023, 1, 1)
update_2024 = datetime(2024, 6, 1)
update_2025 = datetime(2025, 3, 1)

cost_object_counter = 1

for company in df_company.collect():
    company_sk = company["company_sk"]
    
    for i in range(50):   # 50 per company
        
        cost_code = f"CO{cost_object_counter:05}"
        
        # Initial version (2023)
        cost_objects_raw.append((
            cost_code,
            company_sk,
            f"Cost Object {cost_object_counter}",
            initial_date
        ))
        
        # Random 2024 update (5%)
        if random.random() < 0.05:
            cost_objects_raw.append((
                cost_code,
                company_sk,
                f"Cost Object {cost_object_counter} - Rev1",
                update_2024
            ))
        
        # Random 2025 update (5%)
        if random.random() < 0.05:
            cost_objects_raw.append((
                cost_code,
                company_sk,
                f"Cost Object {cost_object_counter} - Rev2",
                update_2025
            ))
        
        cost_object_counter += 1

from pyspark.sql.types import *

schema_cost_raw = StructType([
    StructField("cost_object_code", StringType(), False),
    StructField("company_sk", IntegerType(), False),
    StructField("description", StringType(), False),
    StructField("source_updated_timestamp", TimestampType(), False)
])

df_cost_raw = spark.createDataFrame(cost_objects_raw, schema_cost_raw)

df_cost_raw.write.mode("overwrite").parquet(
    f"{base_path}/dim_cost_object_raw"
)

df_cost_raw.orderBy("cost_object_code", "source_updated_timestamp")
